chapter_title.ar: باب آخَرُ فِي التَّقْدِيرِ وَ أَنَّ الطَّعَامَ لَا حِسَابَ لَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – Another Chapter regarding the measurement, and that the food, there is no Accounting for it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/88)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/88)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ فِي الطَّعَامِ سَرَفٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Al hakam, from Shihab Bin Abd Rabbih who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no extravagance regarding the meal’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn al-Hakam from Shihab ibn ‘Abde Rabbihi who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Extragance (overspending) is not applicable in food.’”
